item.title: I'm a park ranger in Colorado, and I'm a filthy hypocrite.
item.description:
I'm sorry, I know we're not supposed to mess with them, I know I know. But I watched this little guy's mom get eaten by a hawk this evening, and he came trundling out of the bushes peeping and trying to hide under my shoe. I couldn't just leave him there! I'm keeping him alive through the night and then I'm taking him to a wildlife rescue in the morning.
Everyday here is beautiful in its own way, I'm always thankful for the interesting life experiences.
We had a wonderful year for snow here, and therefore we are now having a wonderful flush of wildflowers. This one here only grows out of rock crevices and has the splendid name of telesonix
Glorious Bluebell
Cheerful Black-Eyed susans
Weidemeyer’s Admiral
Anyway, little guy is hydrated from a syringe, he gratefully ate a few slivers of grape, and he's peacefully sleeping in an old hat. Chipmunks are so cute, but it's illegal to keep them as pets, not to mention they are super high maintenance at this age. I'm just hoping I can keep him alive through the night. Wish me luck everyone!
item.dc:creator: noproblllama

11. CHANTS CHANTS CHANTS CHANTS

15. Get your emotional support cat today!
16. Every Star Wars Show
17. RAVE WAR
18. The 2 Wolves
19. Aggressive Positivity
20. Always take your frying pan with you!
item.dc:creator: Sidaige

item.title: Bullshit bingo - no we would rather fucken not
item.description:
https://fortune.com/europe/2024/07/01/commute-4-hours-day-pandemic-style-suburban-life-trainline/
We chose to live further away from work because we have to or because we want to. No-one in their sane mind would choose to communicate over an hour unless it was required by some middle layer management bastard who enjoys touching people. Make working from home a universal worker right unless there are grounds against it that can hold up to a pub test. EDIT: Universal - everyone gets the right to WFH by default unless proven impossible. Right as in - it's up to you to decide if you want to work from home unless your employer can prove that the job cannot be performed from home and this proof stands up to the pub test (you ask the mates at the pub if it makes sense). You get to read the arguments against working from home in the contract and if these are not fair you should be able to call them out the same way you can report unsafe jobs or jobs that pay under minimum wage. In case of blue collar jobs, this could also mean not having to show up to the central just because the HR said so. Obviously there are jobs that cannot be worked on remotely (e.g. essential workers) but removing the lemming rush from morning commute will benefit these jobs as well. More parking spaces, less traffic. I'm trying hard here not to mention the environmental benefits but some say there are a factor as well.
item.dc:creator: GeofrontTmP

item.title: I Have A Son!
item.description:
Pardon the selfie...this is a big day for my family, and I can't really celebrate it with my "real" extended family, so I'm celebrating with my Imgur family. I'm fairly quite on here, but have found much love and support on the platform throughout the years. Long story short, I used to have a daughter and a son. Now I have two sons. I'm thrilled introduce you all to Auguste!
He came out to us (father, mother, brother) 6 months ago, and has been transitioning with us and his friends. He's just starting to transition more broadly, and today we made the announcement to the extended family. They're mostly very religious, and we do not expect it to go well. Our outlook is "hoping for the best, prepared for alternatives." Photo taken in my home office by my whiteboard, which Auggie has loved to write and draw on from a young age. His scrawls have been the topic of many meetings.
Since coming out, I've seen him come alive after multiple years of depression and anxiety. He's funny, smart, and an amazing artist. Most importantly, he's a kind, good person. He supports his friends and his family, and is always looking for ways to make someone's day better. It breaks my heart that those closest to him will likely not support him, as he's always been there for them.
This is Auguste at his first art show, earlier this year (April). He was invited to display some of his work at the local college (as a high school junior!). If you want to check out his amazing digital art and paintings, you can find him on instagram here: https://www.instagram.com/the_blueberrie_fairy/ You may notice a focus on F1, which is something we've bonded over this past year. He's a huge McLaren fan and I'm a Ferrari stan. Fred Vasseur, if you're reading this, get your head out of your ass!
As is the custom, I present to you one Harley tax. She is the goodest girl. P.S. - Auguste, I love you, and I am so proud of you. I know I tell you every day, but words aren't enough. I'm sorry that the world will likely never understand you, and that you will have to fight for your place more than others. But you've proven again and again that you're more than up for the challenge. Keep being you, no matter what the world says. And when they do say "stop that," look down from your mountain of success and say, "I can't hear you up here, you'll have to speak up." - Dad EDIT: I am overwhelmed by the outpouring of support and kindness everyone has shown. I shared the post and comments with Auguste and he was extremely moved. I love this community. Most Viral Edit: As this has now gone most viral, I'm going to wave to my brother (who introduced me to this platform many moons ago). He and his partner have been extremely supportive. Thanks dude, love ya!
item.dc:creator: humblewordsmith

item.title: Quite possibly the greatest hour of my life.
item.description: I got to spend an hour with my artistic deity before her concert on 29.6.24. Mind blown. Hysterical, animated, warm, gently strong, welcoming, wise… A case of the reality surpassing expectations. I will never forget this experience.
item.dc:creator: mikeoart101

item.title: A Terrified Peach Cobbler
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett I wanted to introduce you to someone incredibly special.
This is Cobbler, and Cobbler has had a tough life.
Cobbler was found as a stray in Oklahoma and never claimed We don't know what her 1 year of life was like before she was rescued, but after spending a few days with her I can tell you it wasn't good.
Last year I took in as many crisis fosters as I could, dogs coming out of really difficult situations So I'm no stranger to high anxiety dogs, even MrsPuckett was highly medicated when she first came home
But I've never met a dog as scared as Cobbler. Even the wind made her tail tuck between her legs and she was absolutely terrified of me
Healing Hearts Rescue saved Cobbler from euthanasia in Oklahoma and transported her to Minnesota On Monday she came to stay with me and my dogs fully equipped with a GPS tracker because she's such a flight risk.
The first night Cobbler spent under an end table in the far corner of my apartment shaking Everytime I stood up she bolted to the closet, anytime I got the leash out she started whimpering
I figured it would be good for her to work with MrsPuckett, a dog that overcame so many issues through exercise So the 3 of us started adventuring together on calm streets.
It didn't take long for Cobbler to start taking cues from Puckett Right away her anxiety went from 100 to 90, it was a good start
Her face and body start to loosen up with every mile
She started looking forward instead of constantly scanning for threats
She started standing a little taller.
AND LOOK AT MSCOBBLER NOW ＼⁠(⁠°⁠o⁠°⁠)⁠／
Cobbler has a long way to go but if she's done this well in the first 72 hours, I believe in her the entire way
For a dog like Cobbler it really takes a community I only have 7 days with her and in that time she's going to make an incredible amount of progress
After 7 days with The Pucketts she'll go back to her foster home and we'll start looking for a potential adopter One that has the time, energy and know-how to continue working with her like we are.
That's the incredible thing about dogs and humans We all reach different levels of being broken at different times, but things can always get better if we have support.
This has been a huge shift for me personally, going from working with privately funded shelters to a local rescue league Nashville Humane took in cute dogs that they knew would get adopted Healing Hearts Rescue takes in dogs that nobody else will give a second chance.
So to see Imgur raise over $5,000 for the rescue last week and Imgurians all over the world sending them items they desperately needed It really meant so much to me and I can't thank you enough for all the support.
I've never been so happy to hear a dog snore in my entire life. You're doing a wonderful job Cobbler Beans, everything is about to get better for you. ... If you'd like to send something to Healing Hearts to help them in saving dogs like Cobbler, check out their wishlist below https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT You can also donate directly to them and even $20 goes a long way when so many people are involved https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ ... Thank you for reading about Cobbler, I'll be back with more Nanna bridge trips soon!
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: A huge win (Follow up post) witha dump
item.description:
Okay so on one of my previous post I had talked about this happening since that time there was an issue and insurance didn't cover it at first even though they were going to. Then the doctor resubmitted it so now that we got it all sorted out and he had a call with me this morning. Everything is good to go and I'm kind of elated and awestruck because I wasn't expecting this to happen so soon.
I'm definitely going to get this as a tattoo one of these days.
You know I feel safe saying it here but my ears are literally just like Judy's, they are my biggest weakness and no one can take advantage of it cuz you don't know where I am. muhahahaha!
Pretty much
All the damn time.
I mean...
Hoping my bf sees this dump and this one specifically.
Umf, just give my collar a tug >\\\\>
This one someone posted not long ago and it was like an attack on me. XD
Really would love to get this as a tattoo as well.
I'm from Traverse City! Anyone else from Michigan? (I'm sure there are!) The damn yuppers all caused huge traffic issues for the cherry festival.
NGL this looks fun..
And this is partly why I am on my keto diet! I wanna steal the BFs shirts ^~^
Especially to all you people here. Y'all are mostly wonderful. :p
What kind of gun is that?
Yuuuup!!! I constantly have to ask people to repeat.
This goes for anyone, not just my alphabet mafia family o3o
Mhmm this is spot on!
Sallie May was confirmed to be canonically TransFem!
Helluva pride.
Don't mind me, just passing through.
Paying homage to @ElbowDeepInAHorse
Yes yes he is.
Right?
I really loved this little animation.
Fuck yes!
I mean..the bf says they are good.
I need each pair.
Uh idk how this one got in.
She is so cute!
I wish my degree counted.. DeVry University is junk apparently, and now my degree is practically worthless.
Uh..yeah this is definitely an attack. Someone posted it a few weeks ago and I stole it
Eeyup.
Not me.
This sounds like a vacation!
Nope not me, I never do.
Hah, I blew air out my nose when I first saw this.... On top of shooting bubbly water out the nose because I snorted laughing mid drink.
Mint gang here! Runs great on my old i3!
Sadly..I'm only getting one of these ATM. I'll let you guess which x3~
Mooooooooooooooood all the time!
This isn't really a meme but I found it at Walmart and wanted it for me. #poorpuppygirlproblems
Hey I like some pain, does that make me insane?
I found this years ago and it's been buried in my Google drive ever since and I found it again!
Stolen from here, like most of these images o3o But yeah, I figured I would update y'all and actually give it a shot at a meme dumperino.
